sections.instruction: Questions 1-6: Label the floor plan below. Choose FIVE answers from the floor plan and write the correct letters A-I next to questions 1-6. Questions 7-10: Answer the questions below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

sections.instruction: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content: Complete the notes below using the information provided in the notes context.

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Where did a majority of the nationalities listed below settle? Choose your answers from the list and write correct letters A-C next to questions 21-25. Questions 26-30: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: Most migrants chose where to live based on
There is a trend for people born in Australia to leave Sydney
options: A because it is becoming too busy and crowded
B due to the inadequate infrastructure
C so they can have more money in retirement

questions.content: Among people who recently migrated to Australia, the percentage who settled in Sydney and Melbourne was
The government is considering encouraging migrants to settle in other areas by
options: A offering tax incentive to employers
B making it easier for farmers to migrate
C employing people outside Sydney and Melbourne

questions.content: The number of migrants living in Sydney is likely to be
options: A higher than the statistics indicate
B lower than the statistics indicate
C the same as the statistics indicate

sections.instruction: Questions 31-37: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 38-40: Complete the summary below. Choose your answers from the box and write correct letter A-G next to questions 38-40.

questions.content: Hemp can be a source of foods and health products. It can produce (38) {{BLANK}} containing a higher level of protein. It has many applications in the home. Pain made from hemp is (39) {{BLANK}} Hemp grows well under (40) {{BLANK}} conditions. It is an environmentally friendly solution to many problems.
